label: Crack
suggested_action: Emergency Brake Alert. Halt all train movement on Segment 42A. Dispatch track engineering crew immediately.
technical_report: Critical track fracture detected at Segment 42A with 92% confidence. Structural integrity compromised. Immediate intervention required before resuming operations.

label: Missing Fishplate
suggested_action: Impose emergency speed restriction. Dispatch maintenance crew within 30 minutes. Block segment for passenger trains.
technical_report: Missing fishplate detected at Segment BRC-ST near Vadodara. Rail joint unsecured — high derailment risk at train speeds above 20 km/h.

label: Obstacle
suggested_action: Emergency Brake Alert. Halt trains on approach corridor. Dispatch track patrol to identify and remove obstacle.
technical_report: Foreign obstacle detected on track at Segment HWH-BDC on Howrah approach. Immediate collision risk for approaching express trains.

label: Crack

label: Normal
